item.title: Version 1.1.21
item.description:
What’s New: Enhancements 1. Updated Global Map Inbound revenue & Outbound cost calculation 2. Fixed Deals currency alignment 3. Added network details modal 4. Implemented Top Deals filtering to show only mobile enabled deals.
Bug Fixes 1. Improved Deals page performance 2. Fixed currency mismatch
Security Hotfix Biometric login storage improved using secured storage

item.title: Version 1.1.20
item.description:
What’s New: Enhancements 1. Updated Global Map Inbound revenue & Outbound cost calculation 2. Fixed Deals currency alignment 3. Added network details modal 4. Implemented Top Deals filtering to show only mobile enabled deals.
Bug Fixes 1. Improved Deals page performance 2. Fixed currency mismatch
Security Hotfix Biometric login storage improved using secured storage
